features.name: conditional bidir write with high-impedance
features.description: Code should include a conditional assignment to a bidirectional inout port using a ternary operator where one branch is high-impedance (1'bz)

features.name: bidirectional port read for output assignment
features.description: Code should include an inout bidirectional port being read to drive a regular output signal, combined with conditional assignment to the same bidir
